speaker: narrator
text: Tap the text to show or hide reading controls. Jin Geum-Ryong’s sharp gaze fell on Lee Song-Baek, who returned to the Southern Edge Sect’s side.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Was that really something to be so triumphant about?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Of not course, sahyung.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Anyone here could beat down that child.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jin Geum-Ryong stared at Lee Song-Baek with cold eyes. The fact that elders of the Southern Edge Sect had sat down to make a sword technique with all their heart and soul, clinging to change, but the attitude of this man meant that he would never listen. From one to ten, he hated that child the most. If Chung Myung was the hated enemy that he needed to defeat whenever they met, Lee Song-Baek was the person he hated the most. That suited him the best.

speaker: chung myung
text: ... “I didn’t mean to criticize the path you followed with that sword technique. But don’t show such an unsightly appearance.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I will keep that in mind.”

speaker: narrator
text: ... Feeling the sharp gazes on him, Lee Song-Baek sighed. Lee Song-Baek was a dull person. He had the will to go his own way, but he lacked the skills to persuade others. All he could do was attempt to show them he was on the right path. But, the road to achieving this proper form of the Southern Edge’s sword technique was long and lonely. He sat down and fixed his gaze on Mount Hua’s camp. ‘How was it, Disciple Chung Myung? Was I on the right track?’ An answer no one would give, but he wanted to hear it from Chung Myung.

speaker: chung myung
text: “This ugly disciple lost to Southern Edge. I will accept any punishment!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon let out an empty coUgh. Seeing such courageous words being thrown out, he felt proud yet sad. Normally, it was the sasuk who should be saying something nice… But someone moved ahead and tapped Tang Soso on the shoulder,

speaker: baek cheon
text: “In life, there are times when you win, and times you lose!! If you have to be punished for losing just once, then we would have no good people left in the world!! Straighten those shoulders!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: Tang Soso’s eyes widened at the kind words of unkind Chung Myung. Could this bastard be this nice? When Baek Sang lost, wasn’t it this bastard who slashed that guy’s head again and again with harshly spoken words? Chung Myung looked at Tang Sos and said, And he lowered his voice even more,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Did you do your best with your sword?”

speaker: narrator
text: Tang Soso, who thoUght for a second, answered with bright eyes,

speaker: tang soso
text: “Right. Then that is that. Win next time.”

speaker: narrator
text: Tang Soso bit her lip, Chung Myung chuckled. ‘I thoUght I picked her up as a bonus.’ Tang Soso as a swordsman, wasn’t someone he had high expectations for. But she was doing a lot better than he thoUght she would, which had to be commended. ‘And the others seem to be stimulated.’ Whether the sword of Tang Soso showed more than expected, the tension on the faces of Mount Hua disciples was clear. They couldn’t let the youngest catch up to them. Martial arts sects always need someone running behind them. And if Tang Soso played that role for Mount Hua, then Mount Hua would become stronger. Tang Soso went back to her seat, nodding her head, and flinched when she met Yu Yiseol’s eyes, Yu Yiseol held out a water bottle she had left next to her and handed it to Soso. Hesitating, she accepted it by looking into the eyes of Yu Yiseol in shame. And Yu Yiseol only said,

speaker: chung myung
text: “The use of the wrist is different from when you use a sword compared to throwing daggers. The more you think about it and learn, the sharper the things get.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I will keep that in mind, sago!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: Tang Soso, whose expression brightened, sat next to Yu Yiseol. Baek Cheon, who looked at that happily, turned to Chung Myung,

speaker: chung myung
text: “The sword… that Lee Song-Baek showed.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I was thinking and…”

speaker: chung myung
text: “My Dong-Ryong is so well grown. You figured it out too.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I told you not to call me that.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “hehe…, ah, why bring your sword out?”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung pressed down on the sword of Baek Cheon, which was being pulled out of its’ sheath, and smiled as he continued,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Your thinking is right.”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon looked at Lee Song-Baek with serious eyes. ‘It is completely opposite to Mount Hua’s sword.’ Mount Hua’s sword, a sword centered around attacking. It was the most splendid sword in the world, and it was something that aimed to repeatedly attack the opponent to gain victory. Wasn’t the plum blossom sword technique sometimes criticized for being too lively for a taoist’s sword? On the other hand, the Thirty-Six Strokes Sword of Lee Song-Baek was a perfect defense. It was a sword that simply blocked all attacks; it aimed for victory throUgh an impenetrable defense. That thoUght became a certainty when he saw Tang Soso and Lee Song-Baek clash.

speaker: baek cheon
text: “You didn’t think that Mount Hua and the Southern Edge Sect would bite and claw at each other for centuries just because of proximity, right?”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “…let’s leave it at that.”

speaker: narrator
text: ‘What is with this guy?!’ Baek Cheon coUghed at Chung Myung, looking at him. Uh, this was embarrassing. Fortunately, Yoon Jong accepted the words on Baek Cheon’s behalf,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Is it because our martial arts are polar opposites?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Since we were close to them, and we both belonged to the Nine Great Sects, and so, of course, that would lead to some occasional clashes. But fundamentally, the two are opposed, so getting along would be toUgh. One had to defeat the other to prove themselves.”

speaker: narrator
text: There were sects with ambiguous relationships within the Nine great Sects, but there were very few with relationships like the one between Mount Hua and the Southern Edge. The fact that the bizarre relationship began with their interpretation of martial arts was a new surprise.

speaker: chung myung
text: “But, the sword that Lee Song-Baek used? The other disciples didn’t seem… they were using one similar to our plum blossom sword, thoUgh?”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung added a few words,

speaker: chung myung
text: “The downfall of the Southern Edge Sect.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “… but, from the outside, it looks stronger.”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung said firmly.

speaker: chung myung
text: “The martial arts of a sect aren’t about being strong or weak. All martial arts tend to follow a path that the sect pursues. Some let go of strength for that.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “… you mean to say that the Southern Edge Sect will collapse? Just like us in the past?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Mount Hua was abandoned.”

speaker: narrator
text: But Southern Edge would bring this upon themselves. The difference was a lot bigger than one could know. Chung Myung glanced to the side at Lee Song-Baek,

speaker: chung myung
text: “But we never know. Their immediate downfall cannot be avoided, but depending on how well their new seeds grow, one day, a bigger tree than now can grow out.”

speaker: narrator
text: And he continued in a serious tone,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Things which rise are bound to fall someday, and there are those who will rise again one day. That is how the world flows.”

speaker: narrator
text: Baek Cheon looked at him with strange eyes,

speaker: baek cheon
text: “When you say such things, you look like a Taoist.”

speaker: baek cheon
text: “It doesn’t suit you.”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung, who wanted a fight, got up with a smile,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Then, I need to go and make more money.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jo Gul raised his hand and asked,

speaker: chung myung
text: “So, you are saying that the Southern Edge Sect’s future is determined by how well Lee Song-Baek is treated?!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “… then it is ruined.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Well. I could not answer that.”

speaker: narrator
text: Chung Myung tilted his head,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Didn’t you see the match drawings?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “If you win today, he will be your opponent.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Sasuk, Jin Gem-Ryong and you get Lee Song-Baek.”

speaker: narrator
text: It really was unfortunate.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Everyone did a good job.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong smiled happily...

speaker: hyun jong
text: “It is a pity that a few lost, but do not feel discouraged. Your journey throUgh life is long, and this is just a passing rain.”

speaker: hyun jong
text: ... “… it might hurt to lose now, but the wounds will train you more.”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “… so, do not be discouraged and… and…”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Here is another sack!!”!

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Do not forget that you are a disciple of Mount Hu-Hua….”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Ugh!! You rotten idiots!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong threw the fan he was holding at Chung Myung. Sitting next to Chung Myung, Hyun Young reached out, grabbed the fan without even looking back, and put it to the side.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Why are you angry again, Sect Leader?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong’s face flushed red in anger at the innocent question,

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Can’t you go and count the money somewhere else?”

speaker: hyun jong
text: “We were seated here first!! Aren’t you the one who barged in? Sect Leader, you have been using your authority too much these days.”!

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong was shocked. Next to him, Chung Myung shook his head and added,

speaker: chung myung
text: “And he has turned into a frog that kicks the tadpoles. And even interferes with the counting of money!! If it was you in the past…!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong’s shoulders dropped. And Baek Cheon approached the man and rubbed his drooping shoulders,

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Don’t bother with them, Sect Leader. We understand you.”

speaker: narrator
text: But whether he was bothered by them or not, Hyun Young, Chung Myung, and Wei Lishan were having the time of their lives. Hands sorting the coins of gold, silver, and money slips.

speaker: chung myung
text: “hehe!!How much is this?”!

speaker: chung myung
text: “Elder, the money earned from all this is no joke!!”!

speaker: chung myung
text: “Baek Sang!! Go and get another sack!!hahah!!Storing money is a problem for us now!! Storing!!”!

speaker: chung myung
text: “That is my sack!! Don’t touch it!! I will cut your fingers!!”!

speaker: chung myung
text: “Look at you being strict!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong, who saw this, covered his face with a hand. ‘Aren’t they like bandits who looted merchants or gambling houses?’ Watching the three people counting money with sly smiles on their faces, he couldn’t tell if they were part of the Mount Hua Sect or the Chung Myung Sect. ‘Why is that guy there?’ Watching Baek Sang work hard next to Hyun Young, it seemed like he would be spitting fire out along with them.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Huh.On this fine day…”

speaker: narrator
text: Mount Hua performed well today.

speaker: narrator
text: It was unfortunate that a few of them were defeated, but the spirit of the ten disciples going ahead was nice. It was remarkable that ten of Mount Hua were in the final sixty-four who survived today’s spar. Moreover, if it is the plum blossom Sword technique presented by the disciples at the spar, it left a clear and pure impression on everyone who saw it. It is as if the level was doubled….

speaker: chung myung
text: “… right, that is a hill…”

speaker: narrator
text: Making money is a breeze for them. They have been making a lot of money, but it is a skill to make the ones watching them get angry!! These damned beings!! Hyun Jong took a deep breath and said,!

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Well, all of you, get a good rest and do your best tomorrow.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong turned around, not wanting to see them. And he heard a soft voice behind him.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “Tch tch.You don’t understand the deep intentions of the sect leader?”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong smiled at Hyun Young, scolding Chung Myung lightly... Still, he was an elder...

speaker: chung myung
text: “We made a lot of money, he should be upset that he didn’t even get any pocket money!! You need to guess all of this before they say it!!”!

speaker: chung myung
text: “Ah, right!! I didn’t think of that.”!

speaker: chung myung
text: “Come on now, give that to me.”

speaker: narrator
text: ‘That… that elder piece of… I!!’ At that moment, Chung Myung rushed over and shoved golden coins into Hyun Jong’s hands.!

speaker: chung myung
text: “You can use this without telling the kids, Sect Leader.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Hehe.Let us know if that isn’t enoUgh.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “hehe.You don’t have to say it.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hyun Jong couldn’t even say his anger at what he had witnessed. ‘No, well, I could take this much.’ Return of the Mount Hua Sect
